active_requests.description: Six feedback items dispatched to Agent 08 (QA): (1) Test Failure Capture & Auto-Defect Workflow, (2) Historical Run Dropdown tier+timestamp, (3) Background process, (4) Go/No-Go textarea+PDF, (5) External report 404 fix, (6) Priority directive. All items implemented. See STATE_MATRIX.json notes for details.

ITEM-2 (Historical Run Dropdown) refined by human gatekeeper: Dropdown format must show 'Tier — Timestamp' (e.g. 'Sanity — 2026-06-02 14:30'). Added explicit schema requirements for run-history.json (tier field per entry, backfill older entries) and updated page.tsx dropdown display format.

Three new feedback items appended to Agent 08 work order: (ITEM-4) Go/No-Go Text Box Enhancement — replace single-line input with multiline textarea, add scroll support, add 'Download as PDF' button using jsPDF with verdict+comment+timestamp+signature fields; (ITEM-5) Fix External Report Links — audit report existence on disk (none of the 4 reports exist), show disabled/grayed state with 'Not generated yet — run tests first' text, add tooltip with generation commands, create GET /api/qa/reports/status endpoint; (ITEM-6) Priority Implementation Note — ITEM-2 (Dropdown tier+timestamp) must be executed FIRST before any other items as the refinement was previously approved but not yet implemented. WORK_ORDER_v3.0.md updated with all 6 items, updated overview, execution order, and verification criteria.

Three critical bugs found in Agent 08 implementation added to work order v3.3: (ITEM-7) Sanity run tagged as 'custom' instead of 'Sanity' — tier capture bug in run-history.json writing; (ITEM-8) CSV Download exports all 21 test types instead of latest run only — must filter to run scope; (ITEM-9) Test Summary shows all test types instead of filtering to latest run — must add tier-based filtering and visual indicator. Also added permanent 'Sr Test Architect' role expectation requiring Design Review section in all future Agent 08 outputs. WORK_ORDER_v3.0.md, STATE_MATRIX.json, and CHANGE_REQUEST.json updated. Agent 08 NOT dispatched — awaiting human gatekeeper launch command.

completed_requests.description: QA Dashboard Fixes & Enhancements v2.1: (1) Added 6 missing test types (smoke, sanity, acceptance, compatibility, localization, penetration) → 21/21, (2) Fixed QG10/QG11/QG12 from not-executed→pass → 12/12 gates, (3) Enabled sandbox for Full QA + Release tiers, (4) Added live timestamp alongside data date, (5) Merged KPI + Go/No-Go into split-frame layout, (6) Made external reports clickable with href links, (7) Enhanced Sandbox badge with CheckCircle icon + uppercase styling, (8) Renamed 'Selection'→'Tests Selection', (9) Reordered layout: Tier buttons → Build metadata → Tests Selection toggle.
Human gatekeeper (Srinikc) approved both Agents 01 and 02. Pipeline greenlit to proceed to Agent 03.
Supervisor launched Agent 03 (Architect) after Agents 01 and 02 were approved.

STATE_MATRIX.json synced to reflect actual artifacts for agents 07b, 07c, 07d, 09 that were executed but not recorded. All 10 agents now have proper artifact tracking. Pending: Agents 10-15 execution.

ITEM-7: Fixed tier capture bug — run/route.ts now passes --tier to run-tests.js. ITEM-8: CSV export now filters to run scope only + disabled state for no runs. ITEM-9: Test Summary now filters rows to active run's tier scope + blue indicator banner. Design Review conducted: identified tier propagation chain vulnerability; implemented run-scope filtering. Compliance: TypeScript 0 errors, 148/148 tests pass, dashboard HTTP 200.
